Filter: [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $_.Name; FullName = $_.FullName; Length = $_.Length; LastWriteTime = $_.LastWriteTime; CreationTime = $_.CreationTime; Extension = $_.Extension; DirectoryName = $_.DirectoryName; IsReadOnly = $_.IsReadOnly }
Description: Strips FileInfo/DirectoryInfo to lightweight metadata. Keeps: Name, FullName, Length, LastWriteTime, CreationTime, Extension, DirectoryName, IsReadOnly. Use on fill to store compact file listings.
